title: rosularia × lutea
intro: Rosularia × lutea, also known as Golden Rosularia, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as sore throats, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, offering benefits like reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced wound healing. Golden Rosularia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively harnessed and utilized.
